_note: Starter benchmark candidates based on typical SG market prices. source=manual_research. Not real live listings — use as reference points when comparing against actual listings.

shortlisted.title: The Sail @ Marina Bay (2BR, High Floor)
shortlisted.notes: Iconic marina views. 6 min walk to Raffles Place MRT. PT to Funan ~7min. Market rate ~S$5.07/sqft.

shortlisted.title: Marina Bay Residences (1+Study, Mid Floor)
shortlisted.notes: Next to The Sail. Very close to Raffles Place MRT. S$5.35/sqft. Good value for D01.

shortlisted.title: The Clift (1BR, High Floor)
shortlisted.notes: Walking distance to Tanjong Pagar MRT. Budget-friendly D02 option. S$5.86/sqft. Short MRT to City Hall.

shortlisted.title: Parc Sovereign (1+Study, Mid Floor)
shortlisted.notes: Near Tanjong Pagar MRT and conservation shophouses. S$5.71/sqft. Good 1+study layout.

shortlisted.title: Concourse Skyline (2BR, Mid Floor)
shortlisted.notes: Large 2BR near Bugis MRT. Walkable to Funan (~15min walk or 2 MRT stops). S$4.49/sqft — good value.

shortlisted.title: Citylights (1+Study, Mid Floor)
shortlisted.notes: Near Lavender MRT. Slightly further from City Hall but spacious 1+study. S$5.05/sqft.

shortlisted.title: The Centrepoint (1BR, Low Floor)
shortlisted.notes: Above Centrepoint mall. Orchard Road location. Longer commute (~15min PT) but premium lifestyle. S$5.79/sqft.

shortlisted.title: Sophia Hills (2BR, High Floor)
shortlisted.notes: Hilltop boutique development. Views. 8 min walk to Dhoby Ghaut interchange. S$4.65/sqft — competitive for D09.

shortlisted.title: Tiong Bahru Vista (2BR, Mid Floor)
shortlisted.notes: Quieter D03 option. Tiong Bahru MRT ~2 stops to Raffles Place. Good size/price. S$4.27/sqft — best value/sqft on list.

shortlisted.title: Novena Regency (1BR, High Floor)
shortlisted.notes: Budget-friendly D11 pick. Novena MRT, 3 stops to City Hall. Longer commute offset by lowest price. S$5.38/sqft.
